title: Jack's Destruction of Zou Is Revealed
description: On pages 14–16, this part focuses on jack's destruction of zou is revealed within the The Mink Tribe and Jack's Ruin storyline.
scene: The crew encounters the Mink Tribe, Heart Pirates, and the aftermath of Jack's attack, turning the search for Sanji's group urgent.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't think we'd be amiss in assuming some sort of invasion occurred here...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For every single inhabitant of a city that looks like it could house hundreds of thousands...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to have completely vanished without a trace... must have been something huge.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I got the creeps! This country gives me the creeps!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Let's get out of here! Let's find Sanji and the others and hightail it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Look... there are still signs of life.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: which means it must've been a recent occurrence.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Waagh! We shouldn't be out in the open like this!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our enemies are probably lurking close by! We're sit- ting ducks out here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You could inflict some serious torture on this thing...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm still not entirely sure the culprit is even human...

dialogue.speaker: Wanda
dialogue.text: There are quite a few of these claw marks decorating the entire area... looks like something tore at the walls.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Eeek!!!

dialogue.speaker: Wanda
dialogue.text: And these massive footprints!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Did some sort of monster or beast...

dialogue.speaker: Minks
dialogue.text: Invade the Minks' Country?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's as big as an elephant, which

dialogue.speaker: Wanda
dialogue.text: Given the fact that we're dealing with claw marks, there's also the possibility that this was a falling out between drinks.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Well, what we do know...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is that less than a week or two ago, this country...

dialogue.speaker: Wanda
dialogue.text: Suddenly fell to ruin...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What AAA AT!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Then... what about Sanji and the others!?

dialogue.speaker: Wanda
dialogue.text: fell to ruin!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So that's why the city was all empty, huh...

dialogue.speaker: Wanda
dialogue.text: This country is several centuries old. It is knowing as the Mokomo Dukedom.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Less than half a month ago, my friends laughed and smiled here...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The one who laid waste to this country is known as...

dialogue.speaker: Wanda
dialogue.text: Jack.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: WaH! What's this earth- quake!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Erup- lion Rain Approaches! Make haste into the trees!

dialogue.speaker: Wanda
dialogue.text: Or, rather... get on crocy! I'll take you to right belly.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: to your friends!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So Sanji and the others really are here! That's a relief!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Wait... could it be...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hmmm!?

summary: Jack's Destruction of Zou Is Revealed: Luffy's group meets Wanda, Carrot, Pedro, Bepo and the Mink guardians while learning that Jack destroyed the Mokomo Dukedom and that Sanji's group may still be alive.
